tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def incident-ids (map :id high-triggered-incidents))
(def email-body (str "High urgency triggered incidents:\n" (join "\n" incident-ids)))
(email__send_email {:to "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Triage" :body email-body})
(str "Sent email with " (count incident-ids) " incident IDs")"}
